overall.description: Third-person gameplay footage showing a character in a trench coat exploring a post-apocalyptic urban environment with ruined classical architecture, rubble-strewn streets, and abandoned vehicles. The character walks from a covered walkway past a lion statue through an open plaza with a monument and continues down a street lined with decaying buildings and vintage billboards.

scene_state.functional_zone: covered walkway with bronze lion statue

agents.ego_description: walking steadily along a covered pathway beside a large bronze lion statue, passing under fabric canopies

entered.detail: large green-patinated bronze lion sculpture on stone pedestal
tattered fabric awning stretched overhead between poles
ornate black iron fence with stone posts running along the walkway
grand stone building with tall columns visible in the distance

segments.scene_description: The character walks along a sheltered pathway beneath tattered fabric canopies, passing a massive bronze lion statue on the right. Black iron fences line the left side while cracked stone pavement covers the ground, with a classical building facade visible ahead.

scene_state.functional_zone: ruined city street with ivy-covered stone buildings

events.description: turns left at corner, exiting covered walkway into open street with rubble piles
slight turn to right as approaching open plaza area

agents.ego_description: turning left at the corner and walking along a building covered in ivy and vines, navigating past rubble

entered.detail: historic stone building facade covered in climbing ivy and vines with arched doorways
rusted corrugated metal barrier wall on the left side of the path
tall art deco style building with clock face visible on upper floors

segments.scene_description: The character turns left at the corner, leaving the canopy behind, and walks along a narrow street lined with a rusted metal barrier and an ivy-covered stone building. Rubble piles dot the cracked pavement as a tall clock tower building becomes visible in the distance.

scene_state.functional_zone: open plaza with war monument and obelisk

events.description: enters open plaza area with tall obelisk monument becoming prominent
turns right around the base of the obelisk monument

agents.ego_description: walking through the open plaza toward a tall obelisk monument, then turning right to navigate around it

entered.detail: tall stone obelisk monument with decorative base and spire
blue sign with gold lettering reading RESTAURANT attached to iron fence

segments.scene_description: The character emerges into a wide open plaza dominated by a tall stone obelisk monument. Passing a restaurant sign attached to an iron fence, the character turns right around the monument base, with the clock tower building still visible in the background.

scene_state.functional_zone: decaying commercial street with vintage billboard

events.description: enters narrower street with large vintage motorcycle billboard on building facade

agents.ego_description: walking down a rubble-strewn street toward a large billboard, approaching a subway entrance

entered.detail: large weathered billboard on building showing red vintage motorcycle with text
multi-story red brick building with arched windows showing fire damage
red circular subway entrance sign with white border and text

segments.scene_description: The character walks down a decaying commercial street lined with abandoned cars and rubble, approaching a large vintage motorcycle billboard painted on a building facade. A red brick building stands on the left while a subway entrance with a circular red sign appears on the right.

merged_segments.scene_description: The shot follows a continuous camera movement from a sheltered, classical walkway into a wide urban plaza and finally down a decaying commercial street. It begins with the character walking beneath tattered fabric canopies past a massive bronze lion statue and black iron fences. As the character turns a corner and leaves the shelter behind, the scene shifts to a narrow street lined with ivy-covered stone and rusted barriers, leading toward a distant clock tower. The environment then opens into a wide plaza dominated by a tall stone obelisk, where the camera circles the monument's base past an iron fence and restaurant sign. Finally, the path leads away from the plaza and down a rubble-strewn street filled with abandoned cars, passing a red brick building and a subway entrance before approaching a large vintage motorcycle billboard.
